title: EVA HTTP Endpoint
description: A single HTTP operation in the EVA API surface

auth.description: Persona ids that may call this endpoint

feature_flag.description: Feature flag id required, or null if unguarded

request_schema.description: Schema id for request body, or null

cosmos_reads.description: Container ids this endpoint reads from

cosmos_writes.description: Container ids this endpoint writes to

implemented_in.description: Relative repo path of route handler

repo_line.description: 1-based line number of the route handler declaration in implemented_in

test_ids.description: Test function names that cover this endpoint

auth_mode.description: 'any' = at least one auth persona must match; 'all' = all listed personas must be present (default 'any')

transport.description: Protocol transport for this endpoint (default http)

mock_key.description: VITE env var that enables mock mode, e.g. VITE_USE_MOCK_BACKEND

mock_fixture.description: Relative path to MSW/JSON fixture file for this endpoint

story_ids.description: WBS story ids that this endpoint satisfies (cross-ref to wbs layer)

transaction_function_type.description: IFPUG transaction function type: EI=External Input (mutates data), EO=External Output (derived result), EQ=External Inquiry (pass-through read). Used by GET /model/fp/estimate.

ftr_count.description: IFPUG File Types Referenced — derived from cosmos_reads+cosmos_writes length if null
